title: ElementaLL Weapons
description: Custom 3D Minecraft Weapon with animated textures that bring each weapon to life
body: Hello! I'm into animation, so I'm trying to make weapons look more lifelike and varied in Minecraft by adding texture animations to them. You can try the custom weapon by renaming the _diamond sword_ or _netherite sword_ with an anvil. **This texturepack requires OptiFine, you can download it here.**:\ https://optifine.net/home \ **or for Fabric users you need CIT Resewn**:\ https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn \ **and Continuity Mod** (only for Cit Resewn required this) \ https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity \ \ **The full list of weapon names is here**\ [https://bono-elementall.carrd.co/](https://bono-elementall.carrd.co/) \ \ \ \ **Untuk info ngopi, nyangkrok, update dan feedback texturepack ini kalian bisa gabung discord server aku bolo!** You can join my discord server to give feedback about this texturepack! ______________________________ ### ElementaLL Weapons This texturepack contains 11 (now) texture-animated elemental weapons and is still under development. Prepare the anvil and rename it **diamond sword** or **netherite sword** according to the weapon name in the weapon name list below.\ \ **The full list of weapon names is here**\ [https://bono-elementall.carrd.co/](https://bono-elementall.carrd.co/) ![[Daftar ElementaLL Weapons](https://discord.gg/JgxG8sg5m5)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4db9919d767a8ddd90491c4ad7e0e80de429076.gif) **Terms of Use** Silahkan untuk menggunakan tekstur atau model dari texturepack ini dalam proyek non-komersial apa pun. Untuk penggunaan komersial, dapat menghubungi saya di Discord: Bonogakure _I prohibit the use of my resource packs for commercial purposes, including in third-party projects, paid modpacks, public servers with paid tickets or donations, and distribution on other websites._
